div.p: Akses mudah ke ribuan peraturan hukum Indonesia yang selalu up-to-date

option.t-att-selected: 'selected' if int(selected_tahun or 0) == year else None

div.p: Menampilkan peraturan hukum dengan kata kunci ""

div.class: card mb-3 border-start border-info border-4 shadow-sm

span.t-attf-class: badge bg-#{regulation.status == 'berlaku' and 'success' or regulation.status == 'dicabut' and 'danger' or 'warning'} me-2

a.class: nav-link small py-1 px-2 toc-item active

span.class: badge bg-light text-dark border me-1 mb-1
